title: Still Netherite?
description: A Minecraft mod that increase the powers of Netherite armor and Sword. Full Netherite armor set gives the player OP effects.
body:
# Still Netherite?

![Still Netherite?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbd8a0d9b09cfec2a842bce85dabae9369f7439f.png)

Hello everyone!😉 I am DENETH and this is my first mod. With this mod, you can make your Netherite armor god-tier.

### Armor
- Netherite Helmet - +30 armor
- Netherite Chestplate - +66 armor
- Netherite Leggins - +52 armor
- Netherite Boots - +20 armor
- Armor toughness increased by 3x
- Increased knockback resistence

**Full Netehrite armor set gives**
- Strength (Maximum)
- Jump Boost (Maximum)
- Resistance IV
- Speed (Maximum)
- Haste (Maximum)
- Water Breathing
- Fire Resistance
- Health Boost (+6 extra hearts)

Important - These effects are applied only while wearing Netherite armor

### Netherite Sword - 44 attack damage

If you like my mods, don't forget to leave a heart and comment. 😉😏 See ya again with another insane mod 🔥
